title: VERTICES PARTNERS announces Annual Promotions; Manu Varghese made Equity Partner
description: VERTICES PARTNERS has announced a series of promotions across the Firm, effective immediately.Manu Varghese has been elevated from Partner to Equity Partner. Varghese has been a steady and trusted presence within the Firm, contributing meaningfully to its core practice areas over the years.Vinayak Burman, Founder & Managing Partner, VERTICES PARTNERS, commented,“Manu’s elevation to Equity Partner is a moment we have looked forward to. He has been an integral part of what we have built here —
